title: Initial Release
description: The very first release of Mantis Angular Admin Template.

title: Angular 16 Upgrade
description: Upgraded the template to Angular 16 with latest ecosystem improvements.

title: Angular 17 & JWT Auth
description: Major upgrade to Angular 17 and introduction of JWT-based authentication.

title: Control Flow & i18n
description: Introduced Angular's new control flow syntax, multi-language support, and package upgrades.

title: Angular 18 & Defer Support
description: A major update bringing Angular 18, deferred loading, Ant Icons, and significant developer experience improvements.

title: Dashboards & Signal Support
description: Major feature release adding multiple admin panel dashboards and Angular Signals support.

title: Angular 19 & Role-Based Auth
description: A major version bump with Angular 19, role-based authorization, and package upgrades.

title: 100% Standalone Components
description: Removed all NgModule files — the entire template is now 100% standalone components.
conclusion: Note: This is a breaking change if you are extending the template with module-based components.

title: Angular 20 Upgrade
description: Upgraded to Angular 20 with the latest package updates and code improvements.

title: AG Grid Integration
description: Added AG Grid demos to showcase enterprise-grade data grid capabilities.

title: Angular 21 & Signal Forms
description: A major modernisation release — Angular 21, Signal-based Forms, and a full Zone.js removal for maximum performance.

Angular 21 Upgrade: Migrated Reactive Forms to the new Signal-based Forms.
Eliminated dependency on Zone.js for improved performance.

Authentication System: Updated and refactored the entire auth flow for better reliability and maintainability.

Codebase Improvements: Performance optimisations and better project structure.
